summary: Plan-mode PR inventory shard. The hydrated preflight covers #88971 through #89076 only; all hydrated refs are open pull requests with no security-sensitive signal and no shared canonical. No merge, fix, or low-signal close action is planned because merge/fix are blocked by job frontmatter and the shard is not a dedupe cluster. Later job refs were not hydrated in the provided preflight artifact, so they are blocked on fresh live state before classification. #89107 is routed to central security handling because the job body describes an exec SecretRef resolver and labels the PR with merge-risk: security-boundary.
